suggestions.topic: EIP-2488 (deprecate CALLCODE opcode) presentation and PFI decision
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from ACDE #239 due to presenter absence with expected revisit at next call. Needs presentation and stage decision for Hegota.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-6 launch status and readiness check
suggestions.rationale: Target launch mid-week of June 23, 2026 (last week). Critical to confirm all PRs merged, Alpha 11 CL specs released, and client implementations ready including EIP-8282, EIP-8037 refund flow changes, EIP-8246, EIP-7997, EIP-8038, EIP-2780.

suggestions.topic: EIP-7928 BAL state access ordering final decision confirmation
suggestions.rationale: Async decision deadline was end of week after ACDE #239 (June 18). Need to confirm whether Tony's proposal was accepted or if Dragon's alternative was chosen for devnet-6.

suggestions.topic: glamsterdam-devnet-5 participation and Prysm/Nimbus node status
suggestions.rationale: At 95% participation in ACDE #239 with Prysm and Nimbus nodes still offline. Need update on whether these clients have joined and overall network health.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8189 (Snap2 networking) fork target and Meta EIP inclusion
suggestions.rationale: Geth, Besu, ethrex progressing on implementation. ACDE #239 mentioned proposed inclusion in Glamsterdam or Hegota Meta EIP but no decision made. Need to determine fork target and CFI/PFI status.

suggestions.topic: Hegota headliner selection and PFI review
suggestions.rationale: Multiple Hegota PFIs have accumulated (EIP-8188, EIP-8182, EIP-4758, EIP-8131, EIP-8279, EIP-7979, EIP-8173, EIP-7851, EIP-8151, EIP-7645, EIP-8304). Time to begin discussing which should be considered for headliner status and CFI progression.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8254 (cap deposit requests) path to 200M gas floor decision
suggestions.rationale: PFI'd in ACDE #236 as potential path to 200M gas floor, but deposit limit complexity and block building concerns remain unresolved. Need clarity on whether this blocks the 200M gas target for Glamsterdam.

suggestions.topic: 7702 delegation BAL implementation decision from Discord async discussion
suggestions.rationale: Deferred from glamsterdam-devnet-4 with decision to be made in BAL Discord channel. If resolved async, should be confirmed on call. If still open, needs synchronous discussion.
